caption:
What if the most honest thing you owned was a piece of jewellery?

There's something about semiprecious stones that feels genuinely alive — each one carrying its own depth, its own quiet history. These new pieces have just arrived at Blink, and we keep finding ourselves drawn back to them: the cascade of blue topaz catching the light, the delicate thread of multicolour stones that sits against the skin like it was always meant to be there. A hopeful kind of beauty, right on time for the season ahead.

Only at Blink
